revenue: $2.82 billion (Q3 2024 data omitted in excerpt; 9-month revenue up 5.6% YoY to $8.14 billion)
qoq_changes: Short-term investments decreased significantly to $955 million from $3.46 billion at year-end 2024
Long-term debt was reduced to $5.00 billion from $5.75 billion at year-end 2024
new_risks: Macroeconomic headwinds including inflationary pressure and elevated interest rates
Geopolitical instability including the war in Ukraine and uncertainty in the Middle East
Evolving global tariff policies and cross-border trade regulations
management_tone: Cautious but resilient, focusing on steady operational execution and capital allocation amidst ongoing macroeconomic and geopolitical uncertainties.
analyst_note: eBay delivered stable Q3 2025 results with $2.82 billion in revenue and $632 million in net income, maintaining profitability despite macro headwinds. The significant reduction in short-term investments and long-term debt suggests active balance sheet management and deleveraging during the period.
